name: Gold Tennis Bracelet
description: Understated luxury in its purest form. A row of precisely-cut cubic zirconia stones set flush in 18kt gold, secured with a box clasp that clicks with quiet confidence. Wear solo or stack with our charm bracelets.
careInstructions: Store flat. Avoid contact with lotion and perfume. Polish gently with a microfibre cloth.
shipping: Ships within 3–5 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
